title: Implement a monitoring, evaluation and reporting program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a monitoring, evaluation and reporting program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Implement a monitoring and evaluation strategy

pcs.text: Collect relevant baseline data according to MERI plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect relevant baseline data according to MERI plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect relevant baseline data according to MERI plan.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with stakeholders.
